name: Stale User Accounts Disabled
description: User accounts that have not been used for 90 days should be disabled or reviewed to reduce attack surface
remediation: Review the account for necessity. Disable if no longer needed or contact the user to confirm continued need
remediation_steps: Identify accounts with no login activity for 90+ days
Cross-reference with HRIS to verify employment status
Contact account owner to verify continued need
Disable accounts that are no longer needed
